# Project Manifest

---

## Project overview

**Project name:** sudoku-lab
**Description:** Comparative Sudoku solver framework implementing 10+ methodologies across classical, stochastic, Monte Carlo, ML, and DL approaches.
**Current version:** v0.0
**License:** MIT
**Tech stack:** Python 3.11, numpy, rich, PuLP, scikit-learn, PyTorch, neat-python, jupyter
**Privacy model:** Public open source (portfolio project)
**AI/ML layer:** No (planned for future version)
